description: Replace all current ad-hoc controls in SnSynthEditor with the new library components: SynthKnob replaces EqKnob, SynthFader replaces VFader, SynthSwitch replaces ToggleButton, SynthSelect replaces SelectParam, ADEnvelope/ADSREnvelope replace manual fader groups, SectionPanel wraps each section. Also refactor mixer ChannelStrip/FxStrip to use SynthKnob where appropriate.
title: Refactor SN-S editor to use new component library
